---
title: "📚 Bibliography"
format:
  html:
    css:
      - ../bibliographie.css
---

<div class="biblio-container">

## 🔎 Search
<input id="biblio-search" type="text" placeholder="Search references…" />

## 🧭 Filters
<div id="biblio-filters">
  <button class="filter-btn active" data-type="all">All</button>
  <button class="filter-btn" data-type="journalArticle">Articles</button>
  <button class="filter-btn" data-type="book">Books</button>
  <button class="filter-btn" data-type="report">Reports</button>
  <button class="filter-btn" data-type="thesis">Theses</button>
  <button class="filter-btn" data-type="newspaperArticle">Newspaper articles</button>
</div>

## 📄 References
<div id="biblio-list">
  <p>Loading Zotero references…</p>
</div>

</div>

<script src="../zotero.js"></script>
<script src="../_private/zotero_key.js"></script>
